title: B.Sc. Computer Science
description: Comprehensive program covering software development, algorithms, and database management.
eligibility: 10+2 with Mathematics and Science from a recognized board.
careerProspects: Software Developer, Data Analyst, Web Architect, Systems Admin.

title: B.Sc. Physics
description: In-depth study of matter, energy, and the fundamental laws of nature.
careerProspects: Research Assistant, Lab Technician, Academician, Technical Specialist.

title: B.Com. (Honours)
description: Advanced accounting, finance, and business law for future corporate leaders.
careerProspects: Accountant, Financial Analyst, Auditor, Business Consultant.

title: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA)
description: Foundation in management principles, marketing, and entrepreneurship.
careerProspects: HR Manager, Marketing Executive, Entrepreneur, Operations Manager.

title: B.A. English Literature
description: Critical study of global literatures, linguistics, and creative writing.
careerProspects: Journalist, Content Writer, Editor, Public Relations Officer.

title: B.A. Political Science
description: Analysis of political systems, international relations, and public policy.
careerProspects: Policy Analyst, Civil Servant, Political Consultant, Researcher.

title: M.Sc. Mathematics
description: Advanced mathematical theory and its applications in modern research.
eligibility: Graduation in B.Sc. Mathematics with minimum 55% marks.

title: M.Com.
description: Mastering financial management and advanced corporate accounting.
careerProspects: Investment Banker, Tax Consultant, Senior Accountant, Researcher.
